verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is something in my soul Which keeps the shadows all away; It is love, my Saviour's love! Something lightens ev'ry burden, Gives me gladness day by day, It is love, my Saviour's love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh the precious love of Jesus, How it thrills my ransomed soul! More and more I'll sing its praises While the happy ages roll.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the tempter tries to win me Something keeps me true and strong; It is love, my Saviour's love! Something makes my life a blessing To the needy in the throng, It is love, my Saviour's love.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When misfortune overtakes me Something calms my troubled breast; It is love, my Saviour's love! Something draws my soul to heaven, That sweet land of peace and rest. It is love, my Saviour's love.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Soul astray and bowed in sorrow, Something waits for you today; It is love, my Saviour's love! It would give you peace and comfort, Make your burdens roll away, It is love, my Saviour's love.
